# SmashMeals

> SmashMeals provides 100% gluten-free meal prep delivery, offering fresh, chef-crafted meals delivered weekly in the Tri-Cities area.

SmashMeals provides 100% gluten-free meal prep delivery, offering fresh, chef-crafted meals delivered weekly in the Tri-Cities area.

## Menu items
### A la Carte/Bulk Menu
- Steamed Carrots — 4oz
- Burger (4 oz. cooked)
- 4 oz. steamed broccoli
- 5 oz. Scrambled Eggs
- Roasted Brussel Sprouts
- Grilled Chicken Tenders (4 oz)
- Hard Boiled Eggs — 3 hard boiled eggs 
- Sauteed Zucchini (4oz)
- 4 oz. steamed green beans
- 5 oz. scrambled egg whites
- Butter Nut Squash 4oz
- Roasted Russet Potatoes 4oz — Diced Russet potatoes roasted to perfection 
- Apple Wood Smoked Bacon 4 Slices
- Roasted sweet potatoes 4oz
- Toasted Corn

### Bariatric or Low Carb Portions
- Bariatric friendly Cinnamon Protein Egg Soufflé Cup — Cinnamon Protein Egg Soufflé Cup
A warm, fluffy, lightly sweet soufflé-style cup made from egg whites, vanilla protein, and a touch of cinnamon. Soft, airy, and extremely easy to tolerate — perfect for early bariatric stages or anyone wanting a gentle, high-protein morning meal.
Portion (Single Serving)
4 oz egg whites
½ scoop vanilla whey isolate
1 oz unsweetened almond milk
Cinnamon: ¼ teaspoon
Pinch of salt
⭐ Macros (Single Serving)
~170 calories
26g protein
3g carbs
2g fat
- Smoked Brisket & Egg Scramble (low carb) — Slow-smoked brisket folded into buttery scrambled eggs for a rich, protein-packed carnivore breakfast. Smoky, savory, and incredibly satisfying.
Calories: 340
Protein: 31 g
Fat: 22 g
Carbs: 1 g
- Bariatric friendly Strawberry Protein Cheesecake Bite — Bariatric Snack: Strawberry Protein Cheesecake Bite
A smooth, lightly sweet cheesecake-style bite made with Greek yogurt, protein powder, and real strawberries. Soft, creamy, and portion-controlled so bariatric patients can enjoy a snack without blowing their numbers.
Portion (Single Bite)
1.5 oz plain nonfat Greek yogurt
¼ scoop vanilla whey isolate
½ oz reduced-fat cream cheese
1 tbsp finely diced strawberries
A few drops sugar-free vanilla
in a 3 oz cup.
⭐ Macros (Single Bite)
~90 calories
12g protein
4g carbs
2g fat

### Upsells Category
- New product High Protein Ham & Swiss Egg Bites — High Protein Ham & Swiss Egg Bites
Fluffy, savory egg bites packed with diced ham, Swiss cheese, and blended cottage cheese for a smooth, rich texture. Boosted with egg whites for extra protein, these are a perfect grab-and-go breakfast that reheats in seconds and keeps you full for hours.
Gluten free and designed for convenience, this 3-pack delivers clean ingredients, balanced nutrition, and bold flavor in every bite.
3 Pack • Ready in Seconds
Calories: 230 Protein: 26 g
Fat: 13 g Carbs: 2 g

## FAQ
**Q: How does SmashMeals meal prep delivery work in Tri-Cities TN?**
A: Order by Thursday at 11:59 PM online. We prepare your meals fresh over the weekend in our 100% gluten-free kitchen. Meals are delivered fresh Monday morning with free local delivery on orders $50+.

**Q: Do you ship gluten-free meals nationwide?**
A: Yes! We ship to 240+ cities nationwide using FedEx 2-day delivery.

**Q: Are your meals safe for celiac disease?**
A: Absolutely. Every meal is prepared in our dedicated 100% gluten-free kitchen with zero cross-contamination risk.

**Q: What makes SmashMeals different from other meal prep services?**
A: SmashMeals is the Tri-Cities' FIRST and ONLY 100% gluten-free meal prep company.
